bullet_points: Load the raw dataset and handle missing values (replace '.' with NaN).
Map all binary, ordinal, and Likert-scale variables to numeric formats as specified in the encoding notes.
Retain raw string values of QEA_2 and QEB_2 as separate columns for LCA.
Print full frequency tables for QEA_2 and QEB_2 (including "Not sure") to verify encoding.
Construct composite indices for Nature of Work (current/future) and generate country-specific income ranks.
Standardize continuous predictors and save the processed dataset.
Compute the tetrachoric correlation matrix from the 16 binary QHD items.
Perform EFA with oblique rotation (oblimin) specifying exactly 2 factors.
Report factor loadings, communalities, and variance explained.
Save factor scores and the factor loading table as a CSV file.
Fit LCA models for 2, 3, and 4 classes using QEA_2 and QEB_2 as nominal indicators.
Compare models using BIC, AIC, and Entropy to justify the 3-class solution.
Print conditional response probabilities for each class and indicator level.
Assign class membership to each respondent and save the results.
Encode HIDDG and QDB as dummy variables.
Perform multinomial logistic regression to predict class membership (reference: "Stagnant Neutral").
Include "Positive Affect," "Negative Affect," HIDDG, QDB, QKB_1_4, QKB_1_11, and the interaction QKB_1_4 * QKB_1_11.
Print the full coefficient table (standard errors, z-statistics, p-values, odds ratios).
Compute and print predicted class membership probabilities for the four policy-lift combinations.
Check VIF for multicollinearity and save diagnostics.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Multinomial Logistic Regression and Interaction Analysis

bullet_points: Define "High-Complexity" (IT, Life Sciences, Finance) vs. "Low-Complexity" sectors.
Test the sector-complexity-by-organizational-enabler interaction using a likelihood ratio test.
Print the demographic composition (job level, department, generation) of the "Not sure" class.
Calculate Average Marginal Effects (AMEs) for the "Dual-Pillar" predictors.
Save all diagnostic statistics and marginal effect estimates.
Generate a single multi-panel figure combining: LCA class distribution, dual-pillar interaction heatmap/line plot, and AME forest plot.
Ensure all axis labels include measurement units/scale descriptions.
Save the figure as a high-resolution PNG file.
Synthesize quantitative findings: BIC/AIC/Entropy values, conditional response probabilities, odds ratios (with 95% CIs), policy-lift probabilities, AME values, and mediation coefficients.
Interpret the "Dual-Pillar" effect and the role of affective disposition in AI-driven job security perceptions.
Write the full Results section, explicitly referencing each plot by filename and panel label.
